title: Mega Audino Battle Guide
summary: The only Mega built purely around support — 103/126/126 bulk plus [fairy] typing makes it the cleanest [wish] passer in Champions.
strengths: Symmetric 126 Def and 126 SpD tanks both physical and special hits
[fairy] typing cleanly blanks Dark, Dragon, and Fighting STAB
[wish] plus [heal-bell] turns it into a cycle hub for the whole team
weaknesses: [steel] and Poison 2x weaknesses remain and get punished hard
60 Atk makes its threat ceiling almost nothing — taunt deletes it
Turn one before Mega Evolution leaves it without [healer]

recommendedMoves.reason: Required [fairy] STAB so Dark and Dragon attackers cannot freely click
103 HP base makes the heal cover over half of most teammates
nullifies entire status strategies in one click
safely scouts moves and times windows

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Audino is the oddball Mega — the only one built entirely around keeping the team alive rather than pressuring the opponent. Adding [fairy] on top of [normal] gives it perfect matchups into Dark and Dragon, and the 126/126 defensive split means you don't have to guess which side of the opposing attacker will hit. It plays as a pure cycle hub.

## Strengths
The 103/126/126 defensive profile eats one hit from nearly every special attacker in the format and holds up on the physical side too. [fairy] typing blanks Hydreigon's draco-meteor, any Dark pivot's dark-pulse, and Fighting attackers trying to pick off support mons. [dazzling-gleam] is weak on paper but still a real threat off 80 SpA into Dark-types. The real payoff is [wish] — 103 HP base means the healed amount covers over half of most teammates, and [heal-bell] on top of it deletes entire status-based plans in a single turn.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[steel] and Poison both hit for 2x and the format has real pressure on both axes — a flash-cannon spam attacker or an adaptability poison STAB will chase it out. With only 60 Atk the threat ceiling is basically zero, so taunt permanently shuts it down. And because the turn-one ability before Mega Evolution isn't [healer], anything that KOs on the entry turn still works. Opposing stall teams that grind [wish] PP also break it eventually.

## Recommended Moveset
The one offensive slot is [dazzling-gleam] — enough to chunk Dragons and force Dark pivots out, not enough to sweep. [wish] is the core utility: every teammate behind Mega Audino is effectively running leftovers on demand. [heal-bell] is the second support slot, and it lets Mega Audino cure toxic, burn, or sleep stacked on a setup sweeper for free. [protect] is the fourth slot because it safely times [wish], scouts Choice-locked moves, and buys a turn for teammate switch-ins. If the team needs more offensive presence, hyper-voice replaces [dazzling-gleam] to punch through substitute.

## Item · Ability · Tera
The item has to be [audinite], no alternative exists. Post-Mega the ability locks to [healer], which adds a probabilistic cleanse of adjacent ally status in doubles-flavored play. For Tera, [steel] is the first pick because it covers the Poison weakness, adds a [fairy]-[steel] resistance shell, and keeps the Dragon resistance intact. Tera [water] is the backup when the team is weak to Fire and Ground. Tera [fairy] is skippable — [dazzling-gleam] off 80 SpA still doesn't hurt anyone worth the Tera.

## Teammates & Synergy
Mega Audino wants setup sweepers that normally burn HP to function — dragon-dance Dragons, swords-dance Fighting mons, [calm]-mind walls. A [wish] from Mega Audino lets those partners come back full HP repeatedly. The team also needs a [steel] resist (Ground tanks or Fire pivots) and something with prankster or fast taunt to answer opposing setup that Mega Audino can't interrupt. A hazard remover behind it makes the [wish] cycle efficient.

## Play Patterns
Click Mega Evolution on the entry turn every time — the raw turn-one bulk matters more than scouting. Time [wish] so the heal lands the turn after a teammate switches in, not while Mega Audino itself is under pressure. Save [heal-bell] for when the opponent has stacked at least two status ailments on your team; any earlier and the PP is wasted. Never try to stay in against [steel] or Poison attackers — pivot out and come back later in the game for a second [wish] cycle.
